banner_values.description: List of banner media items to display. If the list contains a single item, a simple banner (static image or media view) is shown. If it contains multiple items, a carousel with dot indicators is displayed. If empty or null, the banner view is not shown.

action.description: A hook/deeplink string that is triggered when the user taps on this banner item. Passed to HookUtils.openHookDirect to navigate or perform an action. If empty or null, the banner tap does nothing.

placeholder.description: A placeholder string associated with this banner value. Mapped through to the BannerValues entity and carried alongside the url and action fields.

url.description: The URL of the banner media content (image, video, GIF, or Lottie animation). Used to load and display the banner in the UI. When there is a single banner value, the URL is loaded directly into an ImageView (for IMAGE type) or a MediaView (for other types). When there are multiple banner values, they are displayed in a carousel.

id.description: Unique identifier for this banner component, inherited from ComponentsGenericApiModel. Used to match and select the banner configuration for display on the subscription screen.

type.description: The media type of the banner content. Serialized as lowercase values ("image", "video", "gif", "lottie", "reviews"). Determines how the banner is rendered in the UI: "image" loads a static image via an ImageView, while "video", "gif", and "lottie" are rendered using a MediaView. "reviews" maps to a REVIEWS banner type. Defaults to IMAGE when null.
